values.Description: A new iteration of the discord auto helper bot, written in Python and uses the fuzzy search algorithm to detect and determine questions. It has a WebUI powered by flask. The bot was tested and deployed at a server hosting company discord server with over 5000 active members.
values.Tagline: A smarter implementation for automated help bots on discord
values.Title: Automated Discord Help Bot using Python

values.Description: Use this simple python program to make a file based encrypted text storage system. It uses the python cryptography module.
values.Title: IvyJournal

values.Description:
A complete overhaul of the basic IvyBot with many commands ranging from categories such as:

- Administration
- Server Information
- Bot Owner Commands
- NSFW Commands
- Discord Games
- Truth Or Dare
- ... and many more

The project was made for a personal server and has since been out of development.
values.Tagline: A Discord Bot with Many Features
values.Title: IvyBot 2.0

values.Description: A Music Discord Bot that allowed users to listen to music on Voice Channels. Built using DiscordJS
values.Tagline: A simple discord bot for music
values.Title: IvyBot

values.Description: A beautiful expense manager app built using NextJS, TailwindCSS and Prisma. Deployed with PostgreSQL on Vercel.
values.Title: IvySpence

values.Description: Campus is a teacher-student communication platform which aims to replace whatsapp and other such text-based communication apps. It also supports scheduling and posting events. It is Built using Django and Bootstrap.
values.Tagline: A student-teacher platform for resource sharing and class scheduling
values.Title: Campus

values.Description: A simple shopping app built using NextJS, TailwindCSS(DaisyUI) and MongoDB.
values.Title: SwiftBuyr

values.Description: Find out how well you and your friend know each other. Use this flask app to run a real-time quiz game and get a score!
values.Tagline: A fun minigame to test your friendship
values.Title: Friendship Meter

values.Description: A Discord bot that allows a modular approach to auto responding to frequently asked questions in a server. It uses DiscordJS and has a WebUI built with express featuring full fledged authentication for uploading questions and answers. The bot was used on a server with over 1000 members.
values.Tagline: Modular Discord bot with WebUI for auto responses
values.Title: DiscordJS Auto Response Bot

values.Description: A basic commerce website built using flask for selling items on a vanilla economy lets play in Minecraft.
values.Tagline: A basic commerce website built using flask for selling items on a vanilla economy lets play in Minecraft
values.Title: MineMart
